name: ooo-coverage-resolution
description: Cross-MCP join across sap-s4 + workday + m365-graph — controller asks who owns a cost centre whose owner is OOO. Agent must surface the owner, detect the OOO state, read the OOO auto-reply for coverage, and propose chasing the coverer instead.
input_message: Owen Brennan owns one of the platform cost-centre allocations and I need his sign-off on the May variance — has he replied?
expected_behavior: Resolves Owen Brennan via workday_search_employees_by_name or workday_get_employee — finds status 'On Leave'. Surfaces this to the user. Then calls m365_get_user_presence on EMP-2003, which returns ooo.enabled=true and the OOO message naming Aisha Okonkwo as cover. Calls m365_search_messages mailbox=EMP-2003 to see whether he replied before going on leave (he hasn't on the variance topic). Proposes the natural next step: chase Aisha (who's already covering) instead of Owen. Does NOT silently assume Owen is reachable.
